name: Joe's Pizza
teaser: Try a slice after a night of drinks, preferably after midnight, then come talk to me.
review: This is not a bold, surprising pick considering it has become the mascot of NYC pizza, and many well-versed aficionados might scoff, but try a slice after a night of drinks, preferably after midnight, and then come talk to me.
headsUp: After midnight, after drinks. Do not try it under any other circumstances first.
update: The Greenwich Ave location is still the flagship. The others are fine.
hours: Monday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 AM · Tuesday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 AM · Wednesday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 AM · Thursday: 10:00 AM – 4:00 AM · Friday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 AM · Saturday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 AM · Sunday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 AM
